info.title: DVWA-BruteForce-HighSecurity
info.description: A CLI tool for bruteforcing the DVWA high-security login page.

options.name: --username
options.description: The username to use for the login attempts. [default: admin]

options.name: --url
options.description: The URL of the login page. [default: http://localhost:3000/vulnerabilities/brute/]

options.name: --phpSessId
options.description: The PHP Session Id to include with the request headers. This can be found by using browser DevTools and inspecting the cookies set by DVWA.

options.name: --passwordList
options.description: The absolute path to a password list file (TXT or CSV). If no file is specified, a default password list is used.
